title: 认识一下Figure AI：由梅拉尼娅·特朗普主持的人形机器人背后的公司
summary: The White House hosted its first humanoid robot guest, with first lady Melania Trump appearing alongside a robot from startup Figure AI.（原题：Meet Figure AI: The company behind the humanoid robot hosted by Melania Trump）

title: 奇怪的事情：人工智能和自主武器的未来（播客）
summary: The last big story right before the war in Iran started was the collapse in the relationship between the Pentagon and Anthropic, with the latter objecting to any potential use of its models in either fully autonomous weapons or domestic surveillance. Of course, this story immediately become more relevant with the start of the war, and the reporting that Anthropic’s technology was in fact utilized at the start of hostilities. title: 人择、五角大楼和自主武器的未来
summary: How AI will reshape warfare.（原题：Anthropic, the Pentagon, and the Future of Autonomous Weapons）

title: Mind Robotics 筹集 A 轮融资以开发人工智能驱动的工业自动化
summary: Mind Robotics has raised millions of dollars to apply production data to AI robots with human-like dexterity, adaptability, and reasoning. The post Mind Robotics raises Series A to develop AI-driven industrial automation appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：Mind Robotics raises Series A to develop AI-driven industrial automation）
